coverage.message: backdrop is editorial and ignored by runtime.
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Ignore safely in preprocessing.

coverage.message: collection selectors are expanded before runtime (D6.R2).
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Expand wildcard selectors recursively.

coverage.message: displacement runtime support is partial in current pipeline.
coverage.fallback: Fallback to normal/bump approximation or emit explicit no-displacement policy.

coverage.message: Unsupported legacy test node foo_surface detected.
coverage.fallback: Replace with supported standard_surface/open_pbr_surface equivalent.

coverage.message: geomattr is treated as metadata attribute input.
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Map to runtime material metadata.

coverage.message: geomattrvalue is treated as metadata attribute value input.
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Map to runtime material metadata.

coverage.message: geomcolor is not mapped by default to a runtime material key.
coverage.fallback: Map geomcolor to an explicit material metadata property or ignore intentionally.

coverage.message: geominfo is supported in metadata preprocessing (D6.R3).
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Preserve normalized metadata values.

coverage.message: geomprop references are resolved during preprocessing.
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Keep references in metadata pipeline.

coverage.message: geompropdef is handled as preprocessing metadata declaration.
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Keep declaration for downstream mapping.

coverage.message: geompropvalue is propagated through metadata resolver (D6.R3).
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Resolve against active look mapping.

coverage.message: geompropvalueuniform is normalized before runtime ingestion.
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Keep normalized value in metadata package.

coverage.message: Look is handled by scene translation (D6.R2).
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Keep translated runtime assignments.

coverage.message: legacy material nodes need normalization toward surfacematerial.
coverage.fallback: Normalize legacy material references to surfacematerial during preprocessing.

coverage.message: materialassign is resolved to mesh->material mappings (D6.R2).
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Use deterministic assignment order.

coverage.message: Unsupported custom test node mybsdf detected.
coverage.fallback: Replace with supported BSDF node and migrate graph connections.

coverage.message: Unsupported custom test node myedf detected.
coverage.fallback: Replace with supported EDF node and migrate graph connections.

coverage.message: Unsupported custom test node mymaterial detected.
coverage.fallback: Replace with supported material node and provide migration mapping.

coverage.message: Unsupported custom test node myshader detected.
coverage.fallback: Replace with supported shader node and provide migration mapping.

coverage.message: opgraph is editorial and intentionally ignored in runtime.
coverage.fallback: Keep out of runtime contract and shader paths.

coverage.message: propertyset is consumed by metadata resolution (D6.R3).
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Keep property mapping at preprocessing stage.

coverage.message: propertysetassign is consumed by metadata resolution (D6.R3).
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Resolve to material metadata package.

coverage.message: legacy shader nodes need normalization toward surfacematerial.
coverage.fallback: Normalize legacy shader references to surfacematerial during preprocessing.

coverage.message: surfacematerial is part of runtime linkage contract.
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Preserve material linkage.

coverage.message: token requires preprocessing substitution before runtime load.
coverage.fallback: Resolve token values at preprocess stage or provide deterministic defaults.

coverage.message: token_image is out of D6 scene/meta scope.
coverage.fallback: Handle as D2 texture concern, not as D6 diagnostic failure.

coverage.message: volumematerial is part of runtime linkage contract.
coverage.fallback: No fallback required. Preserve material linkage.

diagnostics.message: displacement runtime support is partial in current pipeline.
diagnostics.fallback: Fallback to normal/bump approximation or emit explicit no-displacement policy.

diagnostics.message: Unsupported legacy test node foo_surface detected.
geomcolor is not mapped by default to a runtime material key.
diagnostics.fallback: Map geomcolor to an explicit material metadata property or ignore intentionally.

diagnostics.message: legacy material nodes need normalization toward surfacematerial.
diagnostics.fallback: Normalize legacy material references to surfacematerial during preprocessing.

diagnostics.message: Unsupported custom test node mybsdf detected.
diagnostics.fallback: Replace with supported BSDF node and migrate graph connections.

diagnostics.message: Unsupported custom test node myedf detected.
diagnostics.fallback: Replace with supported EDF node and migrate graph connections.

diagnostics.message: Unsupported custom test node mymaterial detected.
diagnostics.fallback: Replace with supported material node and provide migration mapping.

diagnostics.message: Unsupported custom test node myshader detected.
diagnostics.fallback: Replace with supported shader node and provide migration mapping.

diagnostics.message: legacy shader nodes need normalization toward surfacematerial.
diagnostics.fallback: Normalize legacy shader references to surfacematerial during preprocessing.
